message:
data(beads,audit): refresh beads issue state and append latest fresh-eyes audit entry

Routine sync of .beads/issues.jsonl to pick up state changes from the
parallel agent swarm (status transitions, acceptance criteria edits,
dependency graph updates). Paired with a new audit_index.jsonl entry
so the fresh-eyes audit trail stays monotonically aligned with the
beads state it was computed against.

No code changes in this commit — purely metadata refresh so subsequent
code commits land against an up-to-date beads and audit baseline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
